/usr/bin/c++  -std=c++11  -g -O3 -Wall -O3 -Wall  -rdynamic CMakeFiles/phy_simulator_planning_node.dir/src/phy_simulator_planning_node.cc.o CMakeFiles/phy_simulator_planning_node.dir/src/phy_simulator/visualizer.cc.o CMakeFiles/phy_simulator_planning_node.dir/src/phy_simulator/ros_adapter.cc.o  -o /root/epsilon/devel/lib/phy_simulator/phy_simulator_planning_node -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/melodic/lib:/root/epsilon/devel/lib /opt/ros/melodic/lib/libroscpp.so -lboost_filesystem /opt/ros/melodic/lib/librosconsole.so /opt/ros/melodic/lib/librosconsole_log4cxx.so /opt/ros/melodic/lib/librosconsole_backend_interface.so -llog4cxx -lboost_regex /opt/ros/melodic/lib/libxmlrpcpp.so /opt/ros/melodic/lib/libroscpp_serialization.so /opt/ros/melodic/lib/librostime.so /opt/ros/melodic/lib/libcpp_common.so -lboost_system -lboost_thread -lboost_chrono -lboost_date_time -lboost_atomic -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libconsole_bridge.so.0.4 /root/epsilon/devel/lib/libphy_simulator_lib.so /root/epsilon/devel/lib/libhkust_pl_vehicle_model.so /root/epsilon/devel/lib/libhkust_pl_common.so -ldw -lglog -lprotobuf /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_highgui.so.3.2.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_core.so.3.2.0 /root/epsilon/devel/lib/libhkust_pl_ooqp_itf.so /root/epsilon/src/EPSILON/core/common/thirdparty/ooqp/lib/libooqpgensparse.a /root/epsilon/src/EPSILON/core/common/thirdparty/ooqp/lib/libooqpsparse.a /root/epsilon/src/EPSILON/core/common/thirdparty/ooqp/lib/libooqpgondzio.a /root/epsilon/src/EPSILON/core/common/thirdparty/ooqp/lib/libooqpbase.a /root/epsilon/src/EPSILON/core/common/thirdparty/ooqp/lib/libma27.a -lblas -lgfortran
